list.name: Changes
list.comment:
config: cleanup and domain finalization
- Remove `memory` property from `vercel.json` to resolve Vercel build warnings. - Update Node.js engine requirement to `>=22.x` in `package.json` for broader environment compatibility. - Update `lastmod` dates in `public/sitemap.xml` to `2026-07-22`. - Update project implementation artifacts and walkthroughs to reflect deployment aliasing and final configuration tasks.

task.summary: Default task

chore: migrate from Gemini to OpenAI and update dependencies
- Replace Gemini references with OpenAI across UI components and server logs. - Update AI models to `o3-mini` for diagnostics and `gpt-4o` for computer vision. - Update `README.md` instructions to use `OPENAI_API_KEY` and improve formatting. - Add missing dependencies: `firebase`, `ai`, `@ai-sdk/openai`, and `@vercel` libraries. - Fix database pool imports in `scripts/test-db.ts`. - Update `tsconfig.json` to include Vite client types. - Add project artifacts and IDEA configuration files.

fix: resolve Vercel runtime configuration error
- Specify Node.js version 22.x in `package.json` engines. - Remove manual `runtime` override from `vercel.json` to fix deployment validation issues. - Update project implementation plan, task list, and walkthrough artifacts to reflect configuration changes.

chore: implement Vercel deployment best practices and security enhancements
- Add `helmet` and `compression` middleware to `server.ts` for improved security and performance. - Implement Edge Network caching headers for idempotent GET endpoints (`/api/welcome`, `/api/movies`, etc.). - Configure comprehensive security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options) and `maxDuration` in `vercel.json`. - Set Node.js engine to `22.x` in `package.json` and remove manual runtime overrides. - Create `.vercelignore` to optimize deployment upload speed. - Add `vercel-deploy.sh` automation script for streamlined environment syncing and deployment. - Expand `.env.example` with detailed configuration for Firebase, reCAPTCHA, and AWS RDS.
chore: update IDEA workspace configuration and task history
chore: update IDEA workspace configuration and task history

remove legacy api utilities and add database scripts
- Removed `auth-utils.ts`, `db.ts`, and `recaptcha.ts` from `api/lib/`. - Added `scripts/setup-db.ts` to initialize the database schema. - Added `scripts/test-connection.ts` to verify RDS connectivity and IAM authentication.

consolidate API into single server for Vercel Hobby plan optimization
- Merged Stream Chat, Ticket DB, and reCAPTCHA logic into `server.ts`. - Reduced serverless function count by consolidating `api/*.ts` into `api/index.ts`. - Moved database utility scripts to `scripts/`. - Updated project documentation and task tracking.

consolidate API into single server for Vercel optimization
- Merge Stream Chat, Ticket DB, and reCAPTCHA logic into `server.ts`. - Reduce serverless function count by consolidating `api/*.ts` into `api/index.ts`. - Update IDE workspace configuration and task history.

implement dynamic sitemap generation
- Add `scripts/generate-sitemap.ts` to automate `sitemap.xml` creation using environment variables. - Add `sitemap` and `postbuild` scripts to `package.json` for automated updates after builds. - Update `public/robots.txt` and `public/sitemap.xml` with the correct production domain and expanded routes. - Update project implementation plan, task list, and walkthrough artifacts to reflect sitemap improvements.

implement dynamic sitemap generation
- Add `scripts/generate-sitemap.ts` and update `package.json` with `sitemap` and `postbuild` scripts. - Update `public/robots.txt` and `public/sitemap.xml` with production domain and routes. - Update project implementation plan and task artifacts.

chore: enhance PWA support and clean up redundant deployment configs
This change implements PWA best practices and removes legacy configuration files to streamline the project for Vercel deployment.
- **PWA Enhancements**: - Added `public/manifest.json` with app identity and icon configurations. - Updated `index.html` with PWA meta tags, theme color, and apple-touch-icon. - **Project Cleanup**: - Deleted legacy Google Cloud deployment files: `Dockerfile`, `app.yaml`, and `deploy.sh`. - Removed `functions/` directory containing legacy Firebase Functions and Genkit samples. - Deleted `metadata.json`. - **Configuration Updates**: - Updated `.vercelignore` to allow access to the `scripts` directory during build. - Updated `public/robots.txt` to disallow crawling of `/api` endpoints. - Refined `.gitignore` environment variable patterns. - **Documentation**: - Updated implementation plans and walkthrough artifacts to reflect the shift from sitemap generation to PWA and cleanup tasks.

feat: implement edge middleware for dynamic greeting
- Update `middleware.ts` to intercept `/welcome` and `/api/welcome` requests. - Integrate `@vercel/edge-config` to fetch and serve greetings directly from the edge. - Update the middleware `matcher` configuration to include the new routes. - Update implementation plan, task, and walkthrough artifacts to reflect edge middleware changes.

Add Google Search Console verification meta tag
- Update verification comment in `index.html` - Add `google-site-verification` meta tag for domain ownership verification
Add Google Analytics tracking script to index.html
Add Google Search Console and Analytics tracking

backend stability and error handling
- Implement global error handler and try-catch blocks in `server.ts` to prevent unhandled rejections. - Add catch-all 404 JSON response for unhandled `/api/*` routes. - Add `/api/auth/session` mock endpoint to improve client-side compatibility. - Update `bypassPaths` and implementation plan to reflect stability and performance focus.

align Edge Config implementation with Vercel best practices
- Add `dotenv-expand` and update `vite.config.ts` to correctly populate `process.env` during local development. - Refactor `middleware.ts` and `server.ts` to use defensive `has()` checks before retrieving values from Edge Config. - Update project documentation and implementation artifacts to reflect focus on Edge Config stability and performance. - Improve fallback handling for the `/welcome` route when Edge Config keys are missing.

Add Dockerfile for Vercel deployment
- Create `Dockerfile.vercel` for multi-stage production builds. - Update `server.ts` to use `process.env.PORT` with a fallback to 3000.
add Vercel Container Registry (VCR) workflow to vercel-deploy.sh

implement CI/CD pipeline and Windows deployment support
- Add GitHub Action workflow for automated deployment to Vercel Container Registry (VCR). - Create `vercel-deploy.ps1` for native PowerShell deployment support on Windows. - Update `server.ts` to ensure `PORT` environment variable is parsed as a number. - Update implementation plan, task list, and walkthrough documentation to reflect new automation features.

implement tiered pricing strategy and battery recovery upsell
- Refactor backend pricing logic to support Budget, Professional, and Authorized tiers. - Implement battery replacement upsell logic with a 50% discount for bundled repairs. - Redesign the Live Quote UI in `App.tsx` into a three-tier "Strategic Value Matrix" comparison. - Update AI assistant system instructions to include a Data Privacy Guarantee. - Adjust B2B discount rate to 15% and update labor/overhead calculation formulas. - Update `src/types.ts` and project documentation to reflect the new tiered structure.

Production launch best practices
- Add rate limiting to API routes using `express-rate-limit`. - Implement a `/api/health` endpoint for uptime monitoring. - Add request logging middleware for improved traceability. - Create `README_PROD.md` with operational guides for rollbacks, monitoring, and secret management. - Optimize font loading in `index.html`.

Production launch best practices
- Add rate limiting to API routes and implement `/api/health` endpoint. - Add request logging middleware for traceability. - Create `README_PROD.md` and optimize font loading in `index.html`.

Production launch best practices
- Add rate limiting to API routes and implement `/api/health` endpoint. - Add request logging middleware for traceability. - Create `README_PROD.md` and optimize font loading in `index.html`.

config: cleanup and domain finalization
- Remove `memory` property from `vercel.json` to resolve Vercel build warnings. - Update Node.js engine requirement to `>=22.x` in `package.json` for broader environment compatibility. - Update `lastmod` dates in `public/sitemap.xml` to `2026-07-22`. - Update project implementation artifacts and walkthroughs to reflect deployment aliasing and final configuration tasks.

MESSAGE.value:
migrate project from Gemini to OpenAI
- Update UI strings and AI model references in `App.tsx`, replacing Gemini with OpenAI (`o3-mini` and `gpt-4o`). - Update `README.md` instructions to use `OPENAI_API_KEY` and improve formatting with fenced code blocks. - Add new dependencies to `package.json`, including `@vercel/node`, `@vercel/edge`, `ai`, and `@ai-sdk/openai`. - Update `tsconfig.json` to include `vite/client` types for environment variable support. - Fix database pool initialization in `scripts/test-db.ts`. - Update `server.ts` initialization logs to reflect the OpenAI migration. - Include project-level IDE configuration files in the `.idea` directory.

migrate from Gemini to OpenAI and project cleanup
- Update UI strings, logs, and model references from Gemini to OpenAI (using `o3-mini` and `gpt-4o`). - Update `README.md` and environment variable instructions to use `OPENAI_API_KEY`. - Add missing dependencies for OpenAI SDK, Vercel, Firebase, and Stream Chat. - Fix database pool initialization in `scripts/test-db.ts`. - Configure `vite/client` types in `tsconfig.json` to resolve environment variable errors. - Add IDE configuration and project metadata files.

chore: migrate from Gemini to OpenAI and update dependencies
- Replace Gemini references with OpenAI across UI components and server logs. - Update AI models to `o3-mini` for diagnostics and `gpt-4o` for computer vision. - Update `README.md` instructions to use `OPENAI_API_KEY` and improve formatting. - Add missing dependencies: `firebase`, `ai`, `@ai-sdk/openai`, and `@vercel` libraries. - Fix database pool imports in `scripts/test-db.ts`. - Update `tsconfig.json` to include Vite client types. - Add project artifacts and IDEA configuration files.

fix: resolve Vercel runtime configuration error
- Specify Node.js version 22.x in `package.json` engines. - Remove manual `runtime` override from `vercel.json` to fix deployment validation issues. - Update project implementation plan, task list, and walkthrough artifacts to reflect configuration changes.

chore: implement Vercel deployment best practices and security enhancements
- Add `helmet` and `compression` middleware to `server.ts` for improved security and performance. - Implement Edge Network caching headers for idempotent GET endpoints (`/api/welcome`, `/api/movies`, etc.). - Configure comprehensive security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options) and `maxDuration` in `vercel.json`. - Set Node.js engine to `22.x` in `package.json` and remove manual runtime overrides. - Create `.vercelignore` to optimize deployment upload speed. - Add `vercel-deploy.sh` automation script for streamlined environment syncing and deployment. - Expand `.env.example` with detailed configuration for Firebase, reCAPTCHA, and AWS RDS.
chore: update IDEA workspace configuration and task history

remove legacy api utilities and add database scripts
- Removed `auth-utils.ts`, `db.ts`, and `recaptcha.ts` from `api/lib/`. - Added `scripts/setup-db.ts` to initialize the database schema. - Added `scripts/test-connection.ts` to verify RDS connectivity and IAM authentication.

consolidate API into single server for Vercel Hobby plan optimization
- Merged Stream Chat, Ticket DB, and reCAPTCHA logic into `server.ts`. - Reduced serverless function count by consolidating `api/*.ts` into `api/index.ts`. - Moved database utility scripts to `scripts/`. - Updated project documentation and task tracking.

consolidate API into single server for Vercel optimization
- Merge Stream Chat, Ticket DB, and reCAPTCHA logic into `server.ts`. - Reduce serverless function count by consolidating `api/*.ts` into `api/index.ts`. - Update IDE workspace configuration and task history.

implement dynamic sitemap generation
- Add `scripts/generate-sitemap.ts` to automate `sitemap.xml` creation using environment variables. - Add `sitemap` and `postbuild` scripts to `package.json` for automated updates after builds. - Update `public/robots.txt` and `public/sitemap.xml` with the correct production domain and expanded routes. - Update project implementation plan, task list, and walkthrough artifacts to reflect sitemap improvements.

implement dynamic sitemap generation
- Add `scripts/generate-sitemap.ts` and update `package.json` with `sitemap` and `postbuild` scripts. - Update `public/robots.txt` and `public/sitemap.xml` with production domain and routes. - Update project implementation plan and task artifacts.

chore: enhance PWA support and clean up redundant deployment configs
This change implements PWA best practices and removes legacy configuration files to streamline the project for Vercel deployment.
- **PWA Enhancements**: - Added `public/manifest.json` with app identity and icon configurations. - Updated `index.html` with PWA meta tags, theme color, and apple-touch-icon. - **Project Cleanup**: - Deleted legacy Google Cloud deployment files: `Dockerfile`, `app.yaml`, and `deploy.sh`. - Removed `functions/` directory containing legacy Firebase Functions and Genkit samples. - Deleted `metadata.json`. - **Configuration Updates**: - Updated `.vercelignore` to allow access to the `scripts` directory during build. - Updated `public/robots.txt` to disallow crawling of `/api` endpoints. - Refined `.gitignore` environment variable patterns. - **Documentation**: - Updated implementation plans and walkthrough artifacts to reflect the shift from sitemap generation to PWA and cleanup tasks.

feat: implement edge middleware for dynamic greeting
- Update `middleware.ts` to intercept `/welcome` and `/api/welcome` requests. - Integrate `@vercel/edge-config` to fetch and serve greetings directly from the edge. - Update the middleware `matcher` configuration to include the new routes. - Update implementation plan, task, and walkthrough artifacts to reflect edge middleware changes.

Add Google Search Console verification meta tag
- Update verification comment in `index.html` - Add `google-site-verification` meta tag for domain ownership verification
Add Google Analytics tracking script to index.html
Add Google Search Console and Analytics tracking

backend stability and error handling
- Implement global error handler and try-catch blocks in `server.ts` to prevent unhandled rejections. - Add catch-all 404 JSON response for unhandled `/api/*` routes. - Add `/api/auth/session` mock endpoint to improve client-side compatibility. - Update `bypassPaths` and implementation plan to reflect stability and performance focus.

align Edge Config implementation with Vercel best practices
- Add `dotenv-expand` and update `vite.config.ts` to correctly populate `process.env` during local development. - Refactor `middleware.ts` and `server.ts` to use defensive `has()` checks before retrieving values from Edge Config. - Update project documentation and implementation artifacts to reflect focus on Edge Config stability and performance. - Improve fallback handling for the `/welcome` route when Edge Config keys are missing.

Add Dockerfile for Vercel deployment
- Create `Dockerfile.vercel` for multi-stage production builds. - Update `server.ts` to use `process.env.PORT` with a fallback to 3000.

implement CI/CD pipeline and Windows deployment support
- Add GitHub Action workflow for automated deployment to Vercel Container Registry (VCR). - Create `vercel-deploy.ps1` for native PowerShell deployment support on Windows. - Update `server.ts` to ensure `PORT` environment variable is parsed as a number. - Update implementation plan, task list, and walkthrough documentation to reflect new automation features.

implement tiered pricing strategy and battery recovery upsell
- Refactor backend pricing logic to support Budget, Professional, and Authorized tiers. - Implement battery replacement upsell logic with a 50% discount for bundled repairs. - Redesign the Live Quote UI in `App.tsx` into a three-tier "Strategic Value Matrix" comparison. - Update AI assistant system instructions to include a Data Privacy Guarantee. - Adjust B2B discount rate to 15% and update labor/overhead calculation formulas. - Update `src/types.ts` and project documentation to reflect the new tiered structure.

Production launch best practices
- Add rate limiting to API routes using `express-rate-limit`. - Implement a `/api/health` endpoint for uptime monitoring. - Add request logging middleware for improved traceability. - Create `README_PROD.md` with operational guides for rollbacks, monitoring, and secret management. - Optimize font loading in `index.html`.

Production launch best practices
- Add rate limiting to API routes and implement `/api/health` endpoint. - Add request logging middleware for traceability. - Create `README_PROD.md` and optimize font loading in `index.html`.

config: cleanup and domain finalization
- Remove `memory` property from `vercel.json` to resolve Vercel build warnings. - Update Node.js engine requirement to `>=22.x` in `package.json` for broader environment compatibility. - Update `lastmod` dates in `public/sitemap.xml` to `2026-07-22`. - Update project implementation artifacts and walkthroughs to reflect deployment aliasing and final configuration tasks.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
config: cleanup and domain finalization
- Remove `memory` property from `vercel.json` to resolve Vercel build warnings. - Update Node.js engine requirement to `>=22.x` in `package.json` for broader environment compatibility. - Update `lastmod` dates in `public/sitemap.xml` to `2026-07-22`. - Update project implementation artifacts and walkthroughs to reflect deployment aliasing and final configuration tasks.
